speaker: speaker1
text: Sarah , what did you do today ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I bought a few things .

speaker: speaker2
text: I bought this coat . Do you like it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah , I like it a lot . It's very pretty . Where did you buy it ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , it wasn't expensive . It was on sale for 20 dollars .

speaker: speaker2
text: I know . It was a really good deal .

speaker: speaker1
text: I don't think you'll need to wear it for a while . It's been really hot lately .
